UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AND JOSEPH TORRANO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 9, 2013. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPERATIVE COMPLAINT; OPPOSING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN APRIL 30, 2013 WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-09-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., JOSEPH TORRANO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND ADDRESS ISSUES RAISED BY DEMURRER, INCLUDING ALLEGING FACTS RE: (1) LOAN AT ISSUE IS "RESIDENTIAL MORTGAGE LOAN" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCC 2923.1; (2) TOLLING OF STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; (3) ASSUMPTION OF LIABILITY; AND (4) FORMATION OF A VALID ORAL CONTACT. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE A JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPROTED.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., JOSEPH TORRANO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend address issues raised by demurrer, including alleging facts re: (1) loan at issue is "residential mortgage loan" within the meaning of CCC 2923.1; (2) tolling of statute of limitations; (3) assumption of liability; and (4) formation of a valid oral contact. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reproted. (D501)
